name: Loop Router
description: Read QA verdicts from Step 6 and route failed entities back to the appropriate earlier step for rework. Pure decision logic -- no API calls.
usage_notes: Run after all Step 6 QA submodules have produced verdicts. Aggregates qa_pass, keyword_score, citation_score, hallucination_score, and meta_title_ok fields from QA items, then applies routing rules to decide whether each entity is approved, looped back, or flagged for manual review. Does NOT execute loops -- produces routing recommendations for the operator.

options.name: default_no_qa
options.label: Default when no QA results
options.description: What to do when no QA result items are found for an entity. "approve" auto-approves, "flag_manual" flags for manual review.

options.name: max_loops
options.label: Max loop iterations
options.description: Maximum number of times an entity can be looped before being flagged for manual review regardless of QA results.

options.name: min_source_pages
options.label: Min source pages
options.description: Minimum number of source pages (text_content items) required. Below this threshold, discovery loops are replaced with flag_manual since there aren't enough sources to rework from.
